text:
First, note that Australia/Sydney is UTC+10 (AEST) or UTC+11 (AEDT) during daylight saving.  
Daylight saving in Sydney starts around October and ends around April.  
September 6 is not in DST period for Sydney (DST starts first Sunday in October), so it's UTC+10.  

3 PM UTC = 15:00 UTC.  
Add 10 hours → 15 + 10 = 25 → 01:00 next day.  

September 6, 1022, 15:00 UTC → September 7, 1022, 01:00 in Sydney.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1022-09-07 01:00
